series.name: Refinery crude runs
caveats: Regional values are source-published confidentiality regions. Canada is a computed sum only when all three regions are present, with component lineage.

series.name: Refinery utilization (percent of capacity)
caveats: Regional percentages are source-published. No Canada utilization is computed because percentages must not be averaged and compatible capacity weights are not published.

series.name: Crude oil production
caveats: Source-published parent total. Net field production and synthetic crude production are overlapping child views and must not be added back to this total. The Atlantic aggregate is not a computed rollup.

series.name: Net field production of crude oil

row_filters.Supply and disposition: Net Field production of crude oil

caveats: Net field production is the source parent of light and medium crude, heavy crude, and non-upgraded bitumen. It excludes synthetic crude production and must not be stacked with its children.

series.name: Light and medium crude oil production
caveats: Statistics Canada publishes light and medium crude together in one coordinate; the two grades are not separated and no density threshold is inferred by this app.

series.name: Heavy crude oil production
caveats: This is Statistics Canada's published heavy-crude category. The cube does not define a density threshold, so the app does not map it to a benchmark grade.

series.name: Non-upgraded crude bitumen production
caveats: The source defines this as in-situ production plus mined production less crude bitumen sent for further processing. Its child rows are therefore not three positive stackable components.

series.name: In-situ crude bitumen production
caveats: This is a gross production input to the source's non-upgraded-bitumen formula; crude bitumen sent for further processing is deducted separately.

series.name: Mined crude bitumen production
caveats: This is a gross production input to the source's non-upgraded-bitumen formula; crude bitumen sent for further processing is deducted separately.

series.name: Crude bitumen sent for further processing

row_filters.Supply and disposition: Crude bitumen sent for further processing

caveats: This is a subtractive flow in the source's non-upgraded-bitumen reconciliation, not a positive production grade to stack with in-situ and mined production.

series.name: Synthetic crude oil production
caveats: Synthetic crude is a source-published child of total crude-oil production and is outside net field production; it must not be added back to the total.

series.name: Equivalent products production
caveats: Equivalent products are a separate source parent comprising condensate and pentanes plus; they are not included in the crude-oil-production total.

series.name: Condensate production
caveats: Statistics Canada states that condensate includes both lease condensate and plant condensate. It is a child of equivalent-products production, not crude-oil production.

series.name: Pentanes plus production
caveats: Pentanes plus is a child of equivalent-products production and is not part of the crude-oil-production total.

series.name: Crude oil imports
caveats: A Statistics Canada methodology change affects crude import and export series beginning January 2020; comparisons across the break require care.

series.name: Crude oil input to Canadian refineries
caveats: This source-published parent total has grade-specific child views. Input is a monthly volume and should not be read as refinery capacity or utilization.

series.name: Light and medium crude oil input to Canadian refineries

row_filters.Supply and disposition: Light and medium crude oil used as an input in refineries

caveats: Grade-specific refinery inputs are components of the total input row. Provincial cells can be suppressed or historically discontinued and are never reconstructed.

series.name: Heavy crude oil input to Canadian refineries

row_filters.Supply and disposition: Heavy crude oil used as an input in refineries

caveats: Grade-specific refinery inputs are components of the total input row. Provincial cells can be suppressed or historically discontinued and are never reconstructed.

series.name: Crude bitumen input to Canadian refineries

row_filters.Supply and disposition: Crude bitumen used as an input in refineries

caveats: This is a grade-specific component of refinery inputs, not the non-upgraded-bitumen production row. Confidential cells remain unavailable.

series.name: Synthetic crude oil input to Canadian refineries

row_filters.Supply and disposition: Synthetic crude oil used as an input in refineries

caveats: Grade-specific refinery inputs are components of the total input row. Provincial cells can be suppressed or historically discontinued and are never reconstructed.

series.name: Crude oil exports
caveats: A Statistics Canada methodology change affects crude import and export series beginning January 2020; comparisons across the break require care.

series.name: Crude oil closing inventory
caveats: Closing inventory is a month-end stock level, not a monthly flow.

series.name: Finished motor gasoline net production

row_filters.Supply and disposition: Refinery and blender net production, supply

caveats: Net refinery/blender production can be negative and must not be clipped; suppressed provincial values remain unavailable.

series.name: Finished motor gasoline imports
caveats: Provincial imports reflect Statistics Canada's published balance geography and are not inferred destinations.

series.name: Finished motor gasoline stock change
caveats: Stock change is a signed monthly balance-flow item; it is not the same as ending inventory.

series.name: Finished motor gasoline exports
caveats: Parent and component product series overlap and must not be stacked without reconciliation.

series.name: Finished motor gasoline products supplied
caveats: Products supplied is a balance/disappearance proxy, not a direct measurement of end-user consumption.

series.name: Finished motor gasoline ending stocks
caveats: Ending stocks are month-end levels; all-suppressed provincial coordinates are shown unavailable rather than as zero.

series.name: Motor gasoline blending components imports
caveats: The table does not split Canadian blending components into CBOB or RBOB; do not infer those components.

series.name: Motor gasoline blending components stock change
caveats: Stock change is signed and is not an inventory level.

series.name: Motor gasoline blending components refinery and blender net inputs

row_filters.Supply and disposition: Refinery and blender net inputs, disposition

caveats: Net inputs can be negative and are not refinery capacity.

series.name: Motor gasoline blending components exports
caveats: This is unfinished blending material, not finished motor gasoline.

series.name: Motor gasoline blending components ending stocks
caveats: Parent and child product views overlap; do not stack blending-component stocks with a parent total.

series.name: Fuel ethanol renewable-fuel plant net production

row_filters.Supply and disposition: Renewable fuel plant net production, supply

caveats: This series begins in 2020; fuel ethanol is contextual to gasoline but is not a child of motor gasoline blending components.

series.name: Fuel ethanol imports
caveats: Fuel ethanol is shown in the gasoline family for market context, not as finished gasoline.

series.name: Fuel ethanol stock change
caveats: Stock change is signed and is not an inventory level.

series.name: Fuel ethanol refinery and blender net inputs

row_filters.Supply and disposition: Refinery and blender net inputs, disposition

caveats: Net inputs can be negative and should not be read as production or capacity.

series.name: Fuel ethanol exports
caveats: Fuel ethanol is contextual to gasoline and must not be added to finished-gasoline parent views without a balance reconciliation.

series.name: Fuel ethanol ending stocks
caveats: All-suppressed provincial coordinates remain unavailable rather than zero.

series.name: Distillate fuel oil net production

row_filters.Supply and disposition: Refinery and blender net production, supply

caveats: Total distillate is broader than road diesel; this table does not publish sulfur-grade components.

series.name: Distillate fuel oil imports
caveats: Total distillate is not relabelled as pure on-road diesel.

series.name: Distillate fuel oil stock change
caveats: Stock change is signed and distinct from the ending-stocks level.

series.name: Distillate fuel oil exports
caveats: Total distillate includes more than road diesel.

series.name: Distillate fuel oil products supplied
caveats: Products supplied is a disappearance proxy, not measured consumption, and total distillate is broader than road diesel.

series.name: Distillate fuel oil ending stocks
caveats: Ending stocks are month-end levels and all-suppressed provinces remain unavailable.

series.name: Kerosene-type jet fuel net production

row_filters.Supply and disposition: Refinery and blender net production, supply

caveats: Net refinery/blender production can be negative and must not be clipped.

series.name: Kerosene-type jet fuel imports
caveats: Geographies are source-published Statistics Canada balance geographies.

series.name: Kerosene-type jet fuel stock change
caveats: Stock change is signed and is not an ending-inventory level.

series.name: Kerosene-type jet fuel exports
caveats: Geographies are source-published Statistics Canada balance geographies.

series.name: Kerosene-type jet fuel products supplied
caveats: Products supplied is a balance/disappearance proxy, not measured end-user consumption.

series.name: Kerosene-type jet fuel ending stocks
caveats: Ending stocks are month-end levels and all-suppressed provinces remain unavailable.
